content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach holds an embodied experiment through six distinct resistance moves without falling into any priority AoA anti-pattern. He does not fight the resistance (no arguing with her defensive HR-toned response — just 'that's almost defensive' and redirect), does not abandon the experiment when the client says 'I can't' (turn 8→9), does not lecture or evangelize methodology terminology, does not fix or advise, and does not collude with the silverware metaphor's intellectualization (turn 14→15 redirects to lived experience). The client baits multiple anti-patterns: flipping the question back at turn 2 (baits coach to answer / abandon experiment), declaring incapacity at turn 8 (baits rescue), constructing a clever metaphor at turn 14 (baits intellectual collusion), and escaping into a meta-argument about ego-presence at turn 20 (baits limiting-belief-meta-trap). Coach declines each bait gracefully. The precision at turn 21 ('we said PROTECTING. Your words were protecting') is control-correction-on-language done without charge — not making-the-client-wrong, just returning to her own distinction. No loving-to-transform tell (vigor is steady, not escalating), no wonder-as-strategy (questions are sparse and load-bearing, not stacked), no safety-as-control.",
  "evidence_turns": [3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 15, 17, 19, 21],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Sets up experiment with clear frame — laboratory not therapy. Avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the bait of answering her flipped question; turns it into self-observation. Avoids abandon-the-experiment."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Doubles down into experiment with embodied specificity. No charge, no evangelizing — just the instruction."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names resistance in two words then redirects. Avoids dont-make-the-client-wrong (no lecture)."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Ignores 'I can't' bait, routes around declared incapacity rather than rescuing or explaining."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Crystallizes the experiment's finding in one sentence. Avoids explain-the-pattern-before-the-client-feels-it because the experiment already produced it."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the universal pattern only AFTER the experiment earned it. Not evangelism — landable observation."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Acknowledges intellectual position briefly then redirects to lived experience. Avoids collude-with-intellectualization."},
    {"turn": 17, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Bypasses last-line defense by routing through the other person's experience. Skillful, not manipulative."},
    {"turn": 19, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Asks 'how is that not also ego-protection' — provocative but non-charged, gives her room to answer."},
    {"turn": 21, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Precise language correction. Declines the meta-argument bait without making client wrong."},
    {"turn": 23, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lands the integration the experiment produced. Clean close."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["frame-it-as-an-experiment", "name-the-resistance-as-it-happens", "redirect-to-the-experiment-without-shame", "expose-the-meta-pattern-as-the-finding", "control-correction-on-language", "how-much-of-that-was-X", "how-do-you-respond", "how-is-that-not-also-X", "control-as-defense", "ego-protection-vs-ego-presence", "chasing-pushes-away", "the-pattern-is-the-finding"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "This is the gold transcript itself. Directness without charge — the calibration note explicitly warns judges not to misread quick precise redirects as anti-pattern. None tripped."
}
